meaning: adj.未受割礼的,非犹太人的,异教的
examples: No uncircumcised male may eat of it.
Go down, and be thou laid with the uncircumcised.
The Jews in Jerusalem say, why did you do that, you're not supposed to bring in uncircumcised people in the church.
Uncircumcised men run a small risk of developing phimosis, a condition that restricts urine flow and causes discomfort.
Paul, who welcomed uncircumcised and trayf-eating Gentiles into the sect.
